---
title: "Current Songs on Repeat"
format: html
listing:
  contents: music_data.yml
  type: table
  fields: [title, artist]
  field-display-names:
    title: "Track"
    artist: "Artist"
---

<style>
.quarto-listing .listing-title,
.quarto-listing td {
  white-space: normal !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
  text-overflow: clip !important;
}
</style>
